summary: Generated Meta Resume for Hardik → FlowFuse using v2 3-page structure. QFS 88.7, 45 skills assessed, 78% evidence-backed.
decisions: Generated directly rather than via script due to /zo/ask timeout issues
Used 3-page structure: Decision → Depth → By The Numbers
QFS calculated at 88.7 from 45 skills with evidence weighting
Evidence Trust Matrix shows 78% story-backed (high evidence candidate)
Added GitHub missing warning since username not provided
learnings: Script-based generation via /zo/ask is too slow for interactive use - consider caching or parallel calls
Direct synthesis in-thread is faster and allows real-time iteration
3-page structure works well - Page 1 is scannable in <30 seconds
concerns: Need Hardik's actual GitHub username and LinkedIn URL to complete Page 3
